channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for April 10, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for April 10, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for April 10, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for April 10, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1756 on April 10 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for April 10, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: The iPhone Air was our most polarising phone of 2025, but this 28% discount makes it an easy recommendation
item.description: TechRadar’s international team of experts were split on the thin and light iPhone Air, but we can all agree it’s the better buy when it’s cheaper than the 256GB iPhone 17.

item.title: The Pitt season 2 finale will have at least 'one real surprise' in store for fans, confirms star — as Dr. Robby's shift takes a turn for the worse
item.description: The countdown to The Pitt season 2 finale has officially begun, with one star teasing at least 'one real surprise' in store when it lands on HBO Max.
